name: humjolisafa_erp

scripts.install-all: npm install && cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
scripts.build: cd frontend && npm install --include=dev && npm run build && cd ../backend && npm install
scripts.start:backend: cd backend && node seed_if_empty.js && node server.js
